title: JavaFX Stage Events
summary: The JavaFX Stage class represents a window in a JavaFX app. The JavaFX Stage tutorial has been updated with a section about which events you can listen for on a JavaFX Stage (close requested, showing, shown, hiding, hidden).
content: The JavaFX Stage class represents a window in a JavaFX app. The JavaFX Stage tutorial has been updated with a section about which events you can listen for on a JavaFX Stage (close requested, showing, shown, hiding, hidden).
